chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْحُبِّ فِي اللَّهِ وَ الْبُغْضِ فِي اللَّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – The love regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the hatred regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (266/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (266/ 8)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: مَا الْتَقَى مُؤْمِنَانِ قَطُّ إِلَّا كَانَ أَفْضَلُهُمَا أَشَدَّهُمَا حُبّاً لِأَخِيهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, and Ibn Fazzal, from Safwan Al Jammal,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘No two ‘Momineen’ (Believers) would meet at all except that the superior of the two would be with more intense love for his brother’.
en.sarwar: 15. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn abu Nasr and ibn Faddal from Safwan al-Jammal from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Of the two believers who meet each other, the more meritorious one is the one who loves his brethren more intensely.”
